dashboard.title: Dashboard

dashboard.followUpDescription: Track training, nutrition, physio, psychology, and medical services.

followUp.title: Follow-up
followUp.description: Track training, nutrition, physio, psychology, and medical services across your athletes.

training.title: Training
training.description: Track workload, intensity, and session notes.

nutrition.title: Nutrition
nutrition.description: Monitor dietary plans and nutritional goals.

physio.title: Physio
physio.description: Log injuries, recovery progress, and treatments.

psychology.title: Psychology
psychology.description: Record mental performance and wellbeing check-ins.

medical.title: Medical Services
medical.description: Track medical cases, vitals, treatment progress, and treatment adherence.

protocols.title: Protocols
protocols.description: Standard operating procedures and guidelines for each discipline.

coach.label: Coach
coach.description: Training methodologies, session planning, and performance protocols.

physio.label: Physio
physio.description: Injury prevention, rehabilitation, and physiotherapy guidelines.

medic.label: Medic
medic.description: Medical examination standards, health monitoring, and emergency procedures.

nutrition.label: Nutrition
nutrition.description: Dietary guidelines, supplementation standards, and hydration protocols.

psychology.label: Psychology
psychology.description: Mental performance frameworks, stress management, and wellbeing protocols.

adminSetup.title: Admin Setup
adminSetup.description: Manage super admins, admins, and staff members.

athletesSetup.title: Athletes Setup
athletesSetup.description: Register new athletes and manage their profiles.

accessControl.title: Access Control
accessControl.description: Manage roles, permissions, and user access.
accessControl.fullDescription: Manage roles, permissions, and user access across the platform.

roles.title: Roles
roles.description: Create and manage roles. Assign permissions to each role.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.description: View and manage individual permission definitions.

usersAndRoles.title: Users & Roles
usersAndRoles.description: Assign or revoke roles for individual users.

notifications.title: Notifications

tickets.title: Tickets

preferences.title: Preferences

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Control which channels you receive: email and push.
